Class DRDesignCrosstab

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.crosstab.DRDesignCrosstab
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignCrosstab, Serializable
public class DRDesignCrosstab extends DRDesignComponent implements DRIDesignCrosstab

DRDesignCrosstab class.

Ricardo Mariaca
